_comment: Pre-populated Zenodo deposit metadata draft for the unsolved-relay K_0 manuscript. NO deposit has been executed; this file is the operator-reviewable substrate. Conforms to Zenodo deposit JSON schema (https://developers.zenodo.org/#deposit-metadata). Field decisions flagged with _decision_<name>_ comments are operator-gated.

metadata.title: A bounded two-tier null result for integer relations on a hybrid Khinchin-K_0 basis, with a documented capability gap and a Lean 4 statement-shape encoding
metadata.description: A bounded null result on integer relations in a hybrid basis built from Khinchin's constant K_0, its low-order powers, log K_0, and bilinear products of K_0 with seven named constants {pi, e, ln 2, gamma, zeta(2), zeta(3), G}. Sixty-five sub-bases are tested under a two-tier predicate: a rigorous Euclidean-norm bound H_rig = 1.0361 * 10^72 derived from Ferguson-Bailey-Arno 1999 Theorem 1 + Corollary 2 at verification class proven_corollary, and an empirical operational bound H_empop ~ 8 * 10^69 at the primary basis under verification class field_standard_practice per Bailey 1998 section 2's general rule. The M3.1 harness uses mpmath PSLQ with cascading-precision triage (P, 2P, 4P at P = 2160 digits) and an independent PARI/GP lindep second leg. Every sub-basis returns cascade-stable null. The mission also documents a fundamental capability gap at the symbolic-closure stage M4 (K_0's transcendence status is the major open question; seven candidate structural arguments and a four-path SymPy probe each fail), and a Lean 4 statement-shape encoding (~385 lines, Mathlib v4.14.0) which type-checks against an explicit auxiliary-axiom set. The work is conducted under an explicit-evidence-acceptance-and-logging (AEAL) discipline with ten named heuristics, six audited halt events, and twelve mutation-log entries.

creators.name: Papanokechi
creators._decision_orcid_pseudonymity_stance: D-zenodo-orcid-pseudonymity-stance per handoff/summary.md section 5. The paper byline at commit e0defff carries ORCID 0009-0000-6192-8273; the SIARC submission ledger (Items 5/13/28) shows prior Zenodo deposits intentionally omitted the ORCID. The line below is included to match paper byline 1:1; if the operator wants to preserve prior-deposit pseudonymity, comment or delete the orcid field.

metadata._license_rationale: The manuscript is the document deposit (CC-BY-4.0 by convention). Note: the repository papanokechi/khinchin-k0-bounded carries MIT for code and CC-BY-4.0 for docs per env/M1.lock; Zenodo deposit is the document, so CC-BY-4.0 applies.

related_identifiers._decision_related_identifiers_siarc_umbr: D-zenodo-related-identifiers per handoff/summary.md section 5. SIARC umbrella concept DOI placeholder below; operator decides whether to cross-link to this and/or to specific prior deposits (Items 5/13/28).
related_identifiers._status: placeholder; operator may keep, remove, or amend

_canonical_artifact_hashes_for_reproduci._comment: These hashes are not Zenodo metadata fields but the operator-facing audit trail. They reproduce paper/main.tex Appendix A's SHA-256 table.

metadata.notes: This deposit reflects the manuscript draft at HEAD e0defff. The canonical artifacts repository at https://github.com/papanokechi/khinchin-k0-bounded carries the full reproducibility chain (env/M1.lock pinning Lean 4.14.0, Mathlib v4.14.0, mpmath 1.3.0, PARI/GP 2.18.1; harness/sweep_output/ canonical JSONLs; literature/claims.jsonl 20 paper-read or canonically-confirmed claims; mutation_log/ 12 entries audit trail). The mission is conducted under the AEAL discipline; for the methodological context, see paper/main.tex Appendix B and handoff/agent_health_score.md.

_zenodo_deposit_actions_NOT_executed._comment: Per operator directive 2026-05-16 ~17:11 JST: 'Do not execute deposit. The deposit is gated on operator review and an explicit deposit directive.' The fields below document what the deposit step would do; none have been called.
_zenodo_deposit_actions_NOT_executed.step_5_dois_mint: Concept-DOI + version-DOI minted at publish step -- NOT CALLED

_post_deposit_operator_actions._comment: After (if) the operator approves the deposit and the publish step succeeds, the operator's follow-up steps per Brief section M6.2 are:
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_a_record_doi_in_repo: Add the minted version-DOI to env/M1.lock and to paper/main.tex Appendix A.
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_b_apply_gold_M6_tag: git tag -a gold/M6 -m 'M6 closed: manuscript deposited at DOI <new-doi>' <commit> ; git push origin gold/M6
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_c_update_handoff_summary: Fill the [STRUCTURE-PLACEHOLDER] in handoff/summary.md section 1 (plain-language summary) and the [OPERATOR-DECIDES] block in section 3 (next venue).
_post_deposit_operator_actions.step_d_close_mission: Per Brief section M7 if applicable; mission moves to post-mission state.
